title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Customers are reporting 504 errors when attempting to checkout using credit cards.

title: Login MFA Loop
description: Users are being asked for MFA codes repeatedly even after successful verification.

title: Typo in Documentation
description: Found a spelling error in the API reference section under 'Authentication'.

title: Dashboard Charts Not Rendering
description: The analytics tab is showing blank widgets for the last 24-hour view.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Requesting a native dark mode for the mobile application to reduce eye strain.

title: Database Connection Leak
description: Monitoring tools show a steady increase in abandoned DB connections in production.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: Users on the @outlook.com domain are not receiving reset links.

title: Update Subscription Plan
description: Customer wants to upgrade from Pro to Enterprise tier.

title: API Rate Limit Clarification
description: Seeking details on the burst capacity for the Tier 2 API key.

title: Broken Image Links in Newsletter
description: The images in the March newsletter are broken for Gmail users.

title: White Screen on Startup
description: App crashes immediately after the splash screen on Android 14.

title: Invoice Discrepancy
description: Billing statement for February shows a double charge for the storage add-on.

title: Logo Update Request
description: Please update our partner logo in the 'Trusted By' section of your site.

title: SSO Certificate Expiry
description: The SAML certificate for SSO is expiring in 3 days.

title: Slow Search Performance
description: Global search takes over 10 seconds to return results for indexed files.
